description_long: This is a small, pastel pink doll designed to resemble a bunny, featuring a rounded head with two large, upright ears and a soft, chubby body. The face is white with large, expressive brown eyes, a small nose, and subtle blush marks on the cheeks, giving it a gentle and cute appearance. The doll wears a pink onesie with a prominent bow tie at the neck and two yellow buttons down the front, adding to its playful charm. The back of the doll reveals a pair of small, white wings and a round tail, further enhancing its whimsical, fantasy-inspired design. The limbs are short and rounded, with the arms slightly extended outward and the legs close together. The overall surface appears smooth and matte, suggesting a plush or soft vinyl material, ideal for children's play or decorative use in urban parks or playgrounds.
description: A pastel pink bunny-themed doll with large ears, a bow tie, and small white wings, featuring a soft, rounded body and a gentle, cute face.
description_view_0: Front view shows the doll's face, large upright ears, pink bow tie, and yellow buttons on the onesie.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the rounded head, upright ear, and the protruding white wing and tail at the back.
description_view_2: Rear view displays both white wings, the round tail, and the back of the onesie, with no facial features visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the other ear, wing, and tail, with the arm and leg profile visible.
attribute_clothing_style: The doll is dressed in a pastel pink onesie styled as a bunny costume, featuring a large pink bow tie at the neck, two yellow buttons on the front, and small white wings and a tail at the back. The outfit is simple, with no visible patterns, evoking a cute, whimsical, and fantasy-inspired look reminiscent of Sanrio or kawaii character designs.
attribute_pose: The doll stands upright with its head facing forward, arms slightly extended outward from the body, and legs close together. The ears are upright, and the wings and tail are positioned at the back.
attribute_facial_expression: The doll has a gentle, neutral facial expression with large, wide-open brown eyes, a small dot nose, and subtle blush marks on the cheeks, giving it a soft and friendly appearance.
attribute_hair_style: No visible hair; the head is covered by the pink bunny hood as part of the onesie.
